title: lomatium planosum
intro: Lomatium planosum, also known as Fernleaf Biscuitroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lomatium planosum include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Lomatium planosum are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential interactions with medications.
